calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-13-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-13-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Stephanie Burch, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff John Stewart Company.
John P. Zanghi representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Tibor Szladovics is present.
Armilla Staley-Ngomo representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 241 Sixth Street, Unit #300B, San Francisco, California.

This case settled, the trial date of May 18, 2009 is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Nancy Regas, Not Reported. (218)
